d6_marker: marked D6 Coxeter-polarity d20 selector; Dih_6 residual symmetry fixed by B-,B+,S-,S+,V+,V- hexagon
formula: For each listed base-image tuple, reconstruct the unique permutation of the 2576 dodecads preserving all coherent relation labels R_alpha and sending base_points to that tuple. Equivalently, x maps to the unique y with (R(b_i,x),R(x,b_i))=(R(gb_i,y),R(y,gb_i)) for every base point b_i.
